text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Nghhh... Ugh, this doesn't work either.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I need a reset. Maybe I should post that other one first.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Okay, then listen carefully!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: If I win, you have to be my Droit date!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
All right. But don't lose, 'kay? Otherwise, I'm going to the dance with
someone else!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right. It's already Droit time. Not that I really care... Huh? An
email?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
"Tracen Academy Student Council President, Symboli Rudolf"? Why
was this sent to this address? ...Wait, huh?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: "You are requested to perform at the Ligne Droite"?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tonight at the Ligne Droite

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The Ligne Droite... Commonly known as the "Droit," this spectacular
dance party serves to celebrate the start of a new school year, when
the cherry blossoms are in full bloom.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
All the young ponies are adorable in how they get so anxious in
anticipation of this big day. And while finding the right outfit to wear
is important, the most crucial thing is...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Looking for a partner to dance with in the main event of the night.
Yes! It's finding the perfect date to celebrate this incredible moment
in one's life.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Snooore...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh no, am I boring you? Sorry about that. Time to wake up, princess.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What's the big fuss? Messing up my nap on this beautiful day, talking
about "dro"... What's it called again?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The Droit, got it? I'm about to make even more of a fuss, so I thought
it best to give a little background info first. Now... I have something
to ask you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Seiun Sky... would you do me the honor of being my date?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uh...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, whoa—what'd you just say? Your "date"? You mean you
want me to be your partner for the dance?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! They're holding an exhibition dance at the Droit, you see.
In short, it'll be a big kickoff to the main event.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I know this happens every year, but... the president is working extra
hard this time. I wanted to help out, so I proposed the exhibition idea
to her.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You don't say...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Not interested in the slightest, are you? Well, everyone is busy with their races. But it'd just be so wonderful if they would all attend...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So you're goin' around acting as a spokesperson, I get it now. But why would you ask me to be your partner?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to be blunt, but we're not super close or anything, right? I'm not
in Ritto Dorm, and I'm not part of a committee with you or anything.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: However, we are both students at this academy. Isn't that close enough? I suppose it is a bit of a stretch. But aside from that...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You're right. It's customary to ask the person you have the closest
relationship with when choosing a date.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The Droit is an important turning point. So it's natural to spend the
occasion with a partner who's shared the experiences you had the
past year.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"If I win, will you be mine?" Seriously, some people choose their
partner based on who wins a race.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: That's what I'm saying...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But this time, I'm going to be in charge of the exhibition dance. So I'm looking to do just one thing—making the Droit the most thrilling it can be.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And if anyone is capable of doing that... it could only be you, the
"Trickster" herself.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...All right. I mean, I don't get your reasoning one bit, but I see that
you're serious about this.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So I guess I should be up-front with you. My answer is "NO." I ain't
goin'. Find somebody else.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I know you're planning something big, but the spotlight's not for me. I
don't dance in anything besides winning concerts. Not to mention...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I just don't have the time right now. I was actually thinking of taking
my next race kinda seriously this time.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Understood. Then how about this for an idea? Let's make a little
deal.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, a jump shot! You see how high it went? I dunno how you do it,
Sirius!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Sigh... There's no fun, no excitement, no challenge here... I'm done with pool.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text:
Uh, already?! And it's been forever since I got to spend a day off with
you. Umm, there must be something you'd find exciting...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding!

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, perfect timing! Hey, so like, there's this track producer I'm really
into right now, and they just posted a new song! Wanna hear it?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Sure... Might as well.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text:
You'll love it! They're called "!monad"—real identity's a total mystery.
Every so often they'll drop a remix or new track on social media, then
go silent again!

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: They're so good! The sound is aggressive and super tight! But it's got that old-school West Coast vibe too! Killer!

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, yikes. Sorry, I got so excited! Anyway, give it a try! Here's the
account.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
!monad... The profile is just their username, and the only posts are
songs... Hm? This icon...

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text:
So, actually... Hehe, I dunno if it's really gonna happen, but this year I
suggested—

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text: Ah! Sirius, look!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You're alive and well it seems, Sirius Symboli.
